name: code-factory
description: Agent skills for structured software delivery: spec writing, task decomposition, and implementation

interface.shortDescription: Structured software delivery: spec writing, task decomposition, and implementation
interface.longDescription: A complete pipeline for turning rough ideas into implemented, tested, and reviewed code. Includes skills for writing EARS-format design specs, bugfix-specific 3-section specs, decomposing specs into TDD-enforced task lists with parallel markers, orchestrating implementation with 4 parallel specialized code reviewers and test coverage checks, auto-debug escalation, and end-to-end GitHub issue-to-PR automation with content-based bug detection.
defaultPrompt: Use Code Factory to write a design spec for my feature
Decompose this spec into implementable tasks
Execute the task plan and implement the code
